T T T ^ % <NH'l(3^n'SfKW)^FT II, WZ 3, ^ T - ^ (i) 3f ^FTf§Tcf f t sfh 4330 GI/2018 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I I — S E C . 3(i)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th July, 2018 G.S.R. 706(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section 9 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988) and in supersession of the Notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue No. G.S.R. 274(E), dated 23rd March, 2018 except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby constitutes an Advisory Board for a period upto 22nd March, 2019: (i) Hon’ble Mr.Justice Rajiv Shakdher, Chairperson (ii) Hon’ble Mr.Justice A.K. Pathak, Member (iii) Hon’ble Ms. Justice Rekha Palli, Member [F. No. U.-11016/01/2011-PITNDPS] NALINI RANJAN SINGH, Under Secy. Footnote : The Notification G.S.R. 274(E) dated 23rd March, 2018 was published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary) Part II,Section 3, Sub-Section-(i) on 23rd March, 2018. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. A l Ok' KUMAR -- 2 of 2 --
